heroStatement: Building the Autodesk Forma Ecosystem & ESRI Partnership
quote: His command of contextual data and real-time data integration — particularly within the ESRI ecosystem — is exceptional. He consistently translated complex geospatial concepts into intuitive, user-centered experiences that delivered genuine business value.
intro: As Principal UI/UX Designer, I spearheaded the design architecture for the Autodesk Forma Ecosystem. This involved bridging deep technical constraints with user-centric design to create a seamless developer experience, culminating in a major partnership with ESRI.
mission: Design and integrate the Autodesk Appstore directly into the Forma product.
Collaborate with engineering to build and structure the Extension API and SDK.
Author and release comprehensive Design Guidelines for third-party developers.
Guide the ESRI partnership to successfully develop and launch their extension within Forma.
process: Started with messy whiteboard sessions alongside PMs and engineers to untangle complex API requirements, translating those discussions into rough workflow diagrams before any high-fidelity UI was touched.
Identified real friction points in the Developer Experience by building internal add-ons and testing the Extension API/SDK.
Translated complex technical requirements into clear, usage-oriented demonstrations for strategic clients and public events.
Collaborated cross-functionally with product, engineering, and content strategy to ensure a cohesive ecosystem narrative.
kpi: Successfully launched the Autodesk Forma Extension API/SDK and Design Guidelines.
Delivered the ESRI ArcGIS extension integration, creating a new standard for geographic data in Forma.
Presented the ecosystem vision and ESRI partnership on the main stage at Autodesk University.
Improved developer onboarding by identifying and resolving critical UX friction points.
facts: Showcased on the main stage at Autodesk University with Amy Bunzel.
Presented technical demos at major industry events like BIM World Paris.

galleryMetadata.description: Live demonstration of the Autodesk Forma and ESRI ArcGIS integration on the main stage at Autodesk University.
In-product integration of the Autodesk App Store, allowing users to seamlessly discover and install third-party Forma extensions.
The ESRI ArcGIS extension active within the Autodesk Forma canvas, providing rich, real-time geographic context to site models.
The configuration interface and developer portal designed to streamline the creation and management of third-party ecosystem extensions.
